Class CLI

java.lang.Object
whistapp.ui.CLI
Direct Known Subclasses:
GameCLI, MainMenuCLI
public abstract class CLI extends Object
Base class for Command Line Interfaces used in the Whist application.

Provides common input utilities for reading user input, selecting options, and clearing the terminal screen.

  • Constructor Details

    • CLI

      public CLI(Controller controller)
      Create a CLI bound to the given controller.
      Parameters:
      controller - the application controller used by the CLI

  • Method Details

    • getInputString

      protected String getInputString(String prompt)
      Prompt the user for a string input.
      Parameters:
      prompt - the message shown to the user (: is added automatically)
      Returns:
      the string entered by the user

    • getInputInt

      protected int getInputInt(String prompt)
      Prompt the user for an integer input.

      If invalid input is provided the user is asked again.

      Parameters:
      prompt - the message shown to the user
      Returns:
      the integer entered by the user

    • getChoice

      protected <T> T getChoice(String question, T[] options)
      Prompt the user to choose one option from a list.
      Parameters:
      question - the question shown to the user
      options - the available options
      Returns:
      the selected option

    • getYesNo

      protected boolean getYesNo(String question)
      Prompt the user for a yes/no decision.
      Parameters:
      question - the question shown to the user
      Returns:
      true if the user selects "Yes", otherwise false

    • getChoices

      protected <T> T[] getChoices(String question, T[] options)
      Prompt the user to select multiple options from a list.

      The user can toggle options on or off until the selection is completed.

      Parameters:
      question - the question shown to the user
      options - the available options
      Returns:
      an array containing the selected options

    • clearScreen

      protected static void clearScreen()
      Clear the terminal screen.

      This method uses ANSI escape codes and only works in terminals that support them.

      It may not work in Windows CMD or some IDE terminals, but works in most Linux terminals and Windows PowerShell.

    • printSeparator

      protected static void printSeparator()
      Prints a decorative separator line for better readability in the terminal.

    • informUser

      protected static void informUser(String message)
      A helper method for showing messages to the user in a consistent format.
      Parameters:
      message - the message to show
